draft:
To Whom it May Concern:

I am writing this letter to provide my strongest recommendation for Mr. Ravi Malhotra as an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of user experience design, particularly in the areas of voice interfaces and AI-driven music technology. As a General Manager I, Voice & Multimodal UX at Zenith Labs in New Delhi, I have had the privilege of working closely with Mr. Malhotra and witnessing firsthand his remarkable talents and contributions.

By way of background, I have over 10 years of experience leading teams and working hands-on to craft user experiences that enable people to embrace technology with ease. My extensive project-domain experience spans a wide range of areas, including voice interfaces, AI agents, 3D technology, IoT, connected cars, desktop applications, mobile applications, advertising, and packaging design. I have a strong visual sense and a mindset to explore the underlying technology of anything I am involved in or interested in.

At Zenith Labs, I have held various roles, including Senior Chief Designer, Chief Designer, Lead UX Designer, and Senior Designer. In these positions, I have managed and led design teams across multiple domains, such as voice UX for smart homes and Zenith devices, 3D technology applications, and multimedia content creation tools. I have also worked on projects related to IoT, connected cars, and mobile applications. My experience in advertising and packaging design further complements my expertise in user experience design.

Before joining Zenith, I worked as a Designer at Orbit Communications, where I focused on advertising, brand strategy, and design. I also gained experience in architecture through roles as a Jr. Architect at Omega Builders Ltd and an Architect Trainee at Sharma and Associates. My educational background includes a Master of Design in Visual Communication from the National Institute of Design, Ahmedabad, and a Bachelor of Architecture from the School of Architecture, Govt. Engineering College, Kochi. Additionally, I completed a "Design Innovation Made in Germany" scholarship program at AUTO.Design, Technische Universität München, specializing in brand strategy, design innovation, and German design.

Throughout my career, I have developed a wide array of skills relevant to user experience design, including user interface design, graphic design, interaction design, product design, visual design, design strategy, and design thinking. I am also multilingual, fluent in English, Hindi, German, and Malayalam, which has been beneficial for working in international environments and diverse teams.

I have had the pleasure of working closely with Mr. Ravi Malhotra during his tenure at Zenith Corp, where he served as both a Lead Designer and a Senior Designer from August 2014 to March 2017. Throughout this period, I had the opportunity to witness firsthand Mr. Malhotra's remarkable talents and contributions to the field of user experience design, particularly in the areas of voice interfaces and AI-driven music technology.

As a Lead Designer in the research and innovation division of Zenith, Mr. Malhotra worked on several groundbreaking projects that showcased his extraordinary abilities. One of his most notable contributions was to Zenith's AI-based voice interface, Voca. Voice agents are considered the next era in device interaction, and Zenith envisioned creating a voice agent that was not only intelligent but also connected the entire Zenith ecosystem. Mr. Malhotra played a crucial role in this project by designing the personality and UX principles of Voca, identifying major use-cases, and collaborating with field experts on interaction design. His efforts were instrumental in the successful launch of Voca, which now boasts over 10 million daily active users and is available across all Zenith products.

In addition to his work on Voca, Mr. Malhotra also contributed to other innovative projects at Zenith. As a Senior Designer, he focused on the interaction paradigm of hearables, designing voice assistant-enabled wireless headphones based on user research. His work was commercialized into Zenith's flagship device, the Wave Sound X. Furthermore, he designed an IoT-enabled sociable robot, concentrating on personality, out-of-box experience (OOBE), adaptiveness, and multi-user scenarios. His contributions to this project resulted in a pending patent. Mr. Malhotra also developed UX guidelines and identified key scenarios for a foldable smartphone, showcasing his versatility and forward-thinking approach to design.

Mr. Malhotra's ability to blend technical expertise with creative vision is truly remarkable. He consistently pushed the boundaries of what is possible, driving innovation and setting new standards in user experience design. His work at Zenith not only demonstrated his extraordinary abilities but also had a lasting impact on the company's product offerings and user interactions.

Beyond his technical skills, Mr. Malhotra's leadership and collaborative spirit were evident in every project he undertook. He worked seamlessly with cross-functional teams, including engineers, product managers, and other designers, to bring complex ideas to life. His ability to communicate effectively and inspire those around him made him a valuable asset to any team.

Mr. Malhotra's contributions to Zenith were recognized through several patents filed during his tenure. These patents, which cover various aspects of voice interfaces and user interactions, underscore his innovative thinking and technical prowess. His work not only advanced Zenith's product offerings but also contributed to the broader field of user experience design.

Since his time at Zenith, Mr. Malhotra has continued to build on his impressive track record, taking on roles that further showcase his extraordinary abilities. As a UX Designer at Visionary Tech in Stockholm, Sweden, from August 2017 to December 2019, he designed eye-tracking based interactions for dual-display devices like Intel Quantum and Asus VisionPad. He also identified opportunities in eye-tracking based AR interactions, prototyped them, and filed four patents, earning the title of top innovator of Q1 2019. Additionally, he researched, conceptualized, and designed interactions for smartphones with eye-tracking and identified opportunities in eye-tracking based and visually aware voice assistants.

Following his tenure at Visionary Tech, Mr. Malhotra joined Melody HQ in Stockholm, Sweden, where he served as a Product Manager from January 2020 to May 2023. In this role, he led product strategy, roadmap, vision, and execution within Melody's music creation business unit, Soundwave. Working with a cross-functional team of engineers, designers, researchers, and data scientists, he built music creation experiences that significantly enhanced the platform. Mr. Malhotra transformed Soundwave into a real-time collaboration app, leading to a fourfold increase in studio collaboration time. He also crafted a product strategy to help Gen Z users achieve easier and contextual communication by building the "Comments" experience, which increased user interaction with communication features by approximately 40%.

Most recently, Mr. Malhotra has taken on the role of Founder and CEO of Harmony AI, a state-of-the-art AI content creation platform that allows users to create music and podcasts with ease. Harmony uses generative AI to help users brainstorm and translate their stories into musical reality. The platform is on a mission to democratize music creation for aspiring creators, offering tools such as Text to Music, Lyrics Writing, and Stem Separation to help users realize their content dreams more quickly. Harmony has garnered significant attention and praise from various media outlets. Innovators Today highlighted how the platform empowers creators to craft music and podcasts easily, removing typical barriers such as cost, complexity, and time. Musical Insights recognized Harmony as the latest generative AI tool for making music, noting its user-friendly design and advanced technology. British Daily featured Harmony's AI voice assistant, HARMONIA, which simplifies music production by recognizing voice commands and learning user preferences. The Times of New Delhi listed Harmony as one of the top emerging companies in India for 2024, applauding its innovative approach to music creation. Audible News and The Urban Post also praised Harmony for redefining music composition through AI brilliance and pioneering effortless music production, respectively.

Mr. Malhotra's journey from Zenith to Harmony AI showcases his extraordinary ability to innovate and lead in the fields of user experience design and AI-driven music technology. His impressive track record of achievements, coupled with his leadership and collaborative spirit, makes him a valuable asset to any organization. I have no doubt that Mr. Malhotra will continue to make significant contributions to the field and inspire those around him with his vision and dedication.

In conclusion, Mr. Ravi Malhotra is an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of user experience design, particularly in the areas of voice interfaces and AI-driven music technology. His impressive track record of achievements, innovative thinking, and leadership skills make him a valuable asset to any organization. I have no doubt that Mr. Malhotra will continue to make significant contributions to the field and inspire those around him with his vision and dedication. It is with great confidence that I provide my highest recommendation for Mr. Ravi Malhotra.

Sincerely,

Samir Jalan

General Manager I, Voice & Multimodal UX

Zenith Labs, New Delhi

samir.jalan@zenith.com
final:
To Whom it May Concern:

 This letter is written to serve as my highest endorsement of Mr. Malhotra as an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of user experience design, particularly in the areas of voice interfaces, AI-driven music technology, and augmented reality. As a General Manager of Voice & Multimodal UX at the Zenith Labs in New Delhi, I have had the privilege of working closely with Mr. Malhotra and witnessing firsthand his remarkable talents and contributions.

 For context, I have over 10 years of experience leading teams and working hands-on to craft user experiences that enable people to embrace technology with ease. My extensive project-domain experience spans a wide range of areas, including voice interfaces, AI agents, 3D technology, IoT, connected cars, desktop applications, mobile applications, advertising, and packaging design. I have a strong visual sense and a mindset to explore the underlying technology of anything I am involved in or interested in. At Zenith Labs, I have held various roles, including Senior Chief Designer, Chief Designer, Lead UX Designer, and Senior Designer. In these positions, I have managed and led design teams across multiple domains, such as voice UX for smart homes and Zenith devices, 3D technology applications, and multimedia content creation tools. I have also worked on projects related to IoT, connected cars, and mobile applications. My experience in advertising and packaging design further complements my expertise in user experience design.

 Before joining Zenith, I worked as a Designer at Orbit Communications, where I focused on advertising, brand strategy, and design. I also gained experience in architecture through roles as a Jr. Architect at Omega Builders Ltd and an Architect Trainee at Sharma and Associates. Throughout my career, I have developed a wide array of skills relevant to user experience design, including user interface design, graphic design, interaction design, product design, visual design, design strategy, and design thinking.

 As I mentioned, I had the pleasure of working closely with Mr. Malhotra during his tenure at Zenith Corp, where he served as both a Lead Designer and a Senior Designer from August 2014 to March 2017. Throughout this period, I had the opportunity to witness firsthand Mr. Malhotra's remarkable talents and contributions to the field of user experience design, particularly in the areas of voice interfaces and AI-driven music technology.

 As a Lead Designer in the research and innovation division of Zenith, Mr. Malhotra worked on several groundbreaking projects that showcased his extraordinary abilities. One of his most notable contributions was to Zenith's AI-based voice interface, Voca. Voice agents are considered the next era in device interaction, and Zenith envisioned creating a voice agent that was not only intelligent but also connected the entire Zenith ecosystem. Mr. Malhotra played a crucial role in this project by designing the personality and UX principles of Voca, identifying major use-cases, and collaborating with field experts on interaction design. His efforts were instrumental in the successful launch of Voca, which now boasts over 10 million daily active users and is available across all Zenith products.

 In addition to his work on Voca, Mr. Malhotra also contributed to other innovative projects at Zenith. As a Senior Designer, he focused on the interaction paradigm of hearables, designing voice assistant-enabled wireless headphones based on user research. His work was commercialized into Zenith's flagship device, the Wave Sound X. Furthermore, he designed an IoT-enabled sociable robot, concentrating on personality, out-of-box experience (OOBE), adaptiveness, and multi-user scenarios. His contributions to this project resulted in a pending patent. Mr. Malhotra also developed UX guidelines and identified key scenarios for a foldable smartphone, showcasing his versatility and forward-thinking approach to design.

 Mr. Malhotra's ability to blend technical expertise with creative vision is truly remarkable. He consistently pushes the boundaries of what is possible, driving innovation and setting new standards in user experience design. His work at Zenith not only demonstrated his extraordinary abilities but also had a lasting impact on the company's product offerings and user interactions.

 Since his time at Zenith, Mr. Malhotra has continued to build on his impressive track record, taking on roles that further showcase his extraordinary abilities. As a UX Designer at Visionary Tech in Stockholm, Sweden, he designed eye-tracking based interactions for dual-display devices like Intel Quantum and Asus VisionPad. He also identified opportunities in eye-tracking based AR interactions, prototyped them, and filed 4 patents, earning the title of top innovator of Q1 2019. Additionally, he researched, conceptualized, and designed interactions for smartphones with eye-tracking and identified opportunities in eye-tracking based and visually aware voice assistants.

 Most recently, Mr. Malhotra has taken on the role of Founder and CEO of Harmony AI, where his visionary leadership has propelled the company to the forefront of AI content creation. Under his guidance, Harmony AI has developed into a pioneering platform that empowers users to effortlessly create music and podcasts. Utilizing state-of-the-art generative AI, the platform offers innovative tools such as Text to Music, Lyrics Writing, and Stem Separation, effectively breaking down traditional barriers like cost and complexity. This democratization of music creation has opened new avenues for a broader audience of aspiring creators.

 Under Mr. Malhotra's strategic leadership, Harmony AI has achieved significant milestones, including impressive growth in its user base and continued advancements in product development. His focus on leveraging cutting-edge technology to transform users' stories into musical reality has set new standards within the industry. By fostering a culture of innovation and excellence, Mr. Malhotra has driven the team to explore new frontiers in AI-driven music technology, inspiring a new generation of creators to realize their musical ideas with unprecedented ease and creativity. His dedication to pushing the boundaries of content creation has not only solidified Harmony AI's industry position but also redefined how music is created and experienced.

 Outside of his numerous professional achievements, Mr. Malhotra has previously demonstrated his innovative capabilities through his groundbreaking project, "FindYou." This project, which garnered significant acclaim, exemplifies his ability to blend creativity with technical expertise. "FindYou" was an innovative solution designed to enhance location-based services through advanced tracking capabilities. Its impact was recognized on multiple platforms, earning Mr. Malhotra prestigious accolades such as the Yahoo Navigator Award, highlighting its novelty and practical applicability.

 The "FindYou" project also earned Mr. Malhotra the Tata FirstDot award, further attesting to his innovative spirit and entrepreneurial drive. This recognition is a testament to Mr. Malhotra's foresight in identifying emerging technological opportunities and creating impactful solutions. The success of "FindYou" not only underscores his ability to innovate within the tech industry but also foreshadows the transformative work he continues to pursue with Harmony AI. Through projects like "FindYou" and his ongoing leadership at Harmony AI, Mr. Malhotra consistently demonstrates his commitment to pioneering advancements that redefine user experiences and enrich technological landscapes.

 In conclusion, Mr. Malhotra has proven himself to be a highly skilled leader and innovator in user experience design and AI technology. His impactful work at Zenith and his visionary role at Harmony AI highlight his dedication to advancing technology in practical, user-focused ways. His achievements, including the recognized "FindYou" project, demonstrate his ability to merge creativity with technical acumen to deliver meaningful solutions. Mr. Malhotra’s consistent track record of success and innovation marks him as a valuable contributor to any forward-thinking initiative or organization. It is with the utmost confidence that I endorse Mr. Malhotra and highly recommend him for any opportunity that benefits from his outstanding abilities and forward-thinking vision.

 Please feel free to reach out if you require any additional clarification.

Respectfully,

Samir Jalan
General Manager I, Voice & Multimodal UX
Zenith Labs, New Delhi
